mapper.select: SELECT sp.id, ot.task_no AS taskNo, ot.operation_type AS operationType, fp.name AS fieldName, fp.crop_type AS cropType, d.code AS droneCode, sp.planned_start_time AS plannedStartTime, sp.planned_end_time AS plannedEndTime, sp.estimated_area_mu AS estimatedAreaMu, sp.score, sp.decision_reason AS decisionReason, sp.status FROM schedule_plan sp INNER JOIN operation_task ot ON sp.task_id = ot.id INNER JOIN field_plot fp ON ot.field_id = fp.id INNER JOIN drone d ON sp.drone_id = d.id ORDER BY sp.created_at DESC
